name: Pintupi Wati Tjuta Tjungarinyi
description: The Pintupi people are custodians of the Central Western Desert, maintaining deep connections to Tjukurpa through ceremony, songlines, and land stewardship across vast desert Country.

name: Ni'ripono Gwata Tu Sovereign Government
description: The Ni'ripono Gwata Tu people govern their sovereign territory in the Cape York region, upholding customary law and cultural authority over their ancestral lands and waters.

name: Majagi
region: Larrakia, Tiwi Island and Brinkin peoples
description: Majagi represents the collective governance of the Larrakia, Tiwi Island, and Brinkin peoples, custodians of the tropical lands and seas of the Top End.
